label_settings_group_compilations_detail: Treat folders as albums (useful for various artist compilations).
label_settings_reset_details: Removes all playlists, liked tracks, cached images and reset the app to a clean state. Requires a restart.
label_settings_reset_confirm_details: Are you sure you want to reset? The app will restart to take effect.
label_player_queue_empty: You got nothing playing right now
label_playlist_wizard_pattern_help: Use * for any text and ? for a single character.
label_playlist_delete_details: This will delete '{playlistName}' playlist from your library.
label_playlist_tracks_delete_details: This will remove selected tracks from '{playlistName}' playlist.
label_playlist_track_exists: Track is already in your '{playlistName}' playlist.
label_playlist_tracks_exists: Tracks are already in your '{playlistName}' playlist.
label_playlist_tracks_some_exists: Some of these tracks are already in your '{playlistName}' playlist.
label_cover_embed_select_hint: एल्बम फ़ोल्डर में {count} छवि(यां) मिलीं। वह छवि चुनें जिसे इस एल्बम के सभी ट्रैक में लिखा जाएगा।
label_cover_embed_empty: एल्बम फ़ोल्डर में कोई छवि फ़ाइल नहीं मिली।
label_cover_embed_no_directory: एल्बम निर्देशिका निर्धारित नहीं की जा सकी।
label_cover_embed_no_tracks: इस एल्बम के लिए कोई ट्रैक नहीं मिले।
label_cover_embed_result: {processed} में से {embedded} ट्रैक अपडेट किए गए · {errors} त्रुटियां · {skipped} छोड़े गए
label_liked_tracks_delete_details: This will remove selected tracks from your Liked Songs.
message_playlist_export_dap_target_missi: Select a DAP target directory in Settings first
message_dsd_requires_bitperfect: DSD playback is available only when Bit-Perfect is enabled.
placeholder_search_input: What do you want to play?
label_settings_hide_artist_description: Hide artist name on album covers
label_settings_reset_app_description: Reset all settings and clear local database.
label_settings_audio_cd_import_descripti: Output directory, naming template and Discogs credentials for FLAC imports
message_audio_cd_discogs_suggestions_fou: Discogs suggestions found. Please confirm your selection or adjust the search.
message_audio_cd_discogs_multiple_result: Multiple Discogs results found. Click “Select metadata”.
message_audio_cd_cached_metadata_loaded: Loaded saved Discogs metadata for this CD.
message_audio_cd_choose_import_directory: Please select an import directory in settings first.
label_audio_cd_dialog_description: If the CD is not identified clearly, confirm the search and select the matching result.
label_equalizer_subtitle: Adjust each frequency band from -12 dB to +12 dB
label_equalizer_headroom_compensation_de: Automatically lowers preamp when EQ boost is positive
label_settings_dap_transport_desc: Copy via a mounted player folder, or push to the phone over ADB (USB debugging).
label_settings_dap_adb_paths_help: Music is written under …/Music and podcasts under …/Podcasts (same layout as on internal storage). When an SD card is present, those bases are used on the card; otherwise internal storage. One USB-connected device is assumed; no path or serial has to be set. If adb is not installed, a bundled binary is used automatically when available.
label_settings_dap_auto_sync_desc_adb: Automatically start ADB sync after library updates when a device is connected.
label_settings_dap_delete_missing_desc_a: When implemented, removes files on the device that are no longer in Aurora Pulse (mirrors the filesystem option).
label_settings_dap_adb_not_implemented: ADB device sync is not active in this build yet; paths and incremental transfer will follow the same rules as filesystem DAP.
label_settings_dap_auto_sync_desc: Automatically sync to USB/SD after library updates.
label_settings_dap_delete_missing_desc: Removes tracks in the sync folder that are no longer in Aurora Pulse.
label_settings_media_keys_global_shortcu: Active: Play/Pause, Previous/Next are handled system-wide by Aurora.
Inactive: macOS or another app is handling media keys.
label_settings_media_keys_accessibility_: Not allowed. Without this permission, macOS may route keys to Apple Music.
label_settings_media_keys_restart_hint: Please restart Aurora Pulse after changing this.
label_settings_artist_view_mode_descript: आर्टिस्ट पेज का व्यवहार नियंत्रित करता है: बंद आर्टिस्ट छिपाता है, आर्टिस्ट सभी ट्रैक-आर्टिस्ट दिखाता है, एल्बम-आर्टिस्ट एल्बम-आर्टिस्ट दिखाता है और ट्रैक-आर्टिस्ट केवल Various Artists जैसे कंपाइलेशन में उपयोग करता है।
label_settings_bit_perfect_description: आपके DAC के लिए एक्सक्लूसिव ऑडियो पाथ। यदि संगत backend उपलब्ध नहीं है, तो सामान्य प्लेबैक सक्रिय रहेगा।
label_settings_dlna_server_description: आपकी लाइब्रेरी को लोकल नेटवर्क में साझा करता है। क्लाइंट उसी नेटवर्क में सर्वर को स्वतः खोज सकते हैं।
label_settings_updates_auto_description: चालू: स्वचालित जांच, डाउनलोड, इंस्टॉल और रीस्टार्ट। बंद: मैनुअल जांच और मैनुअल इंस्टॉल।
label_settings_updates_beta_description: चालू: स्थिर इंस्टॉलेशन भी नए बीटा रिलीज़ प्राप्त कर सकते हैं।
label_settings_updates_status_downloaded: अपडेट इंस्टॉल के लिए तैयार है
label_settings_updates_save_error: अपडेट सेटिंग्स सहेजी नहीं जा सकीं। कृपया फिर से प्रयास करें।
label_player_output_device_none: कोई रिमोट DLNA डिवाइस नहीं मिला
label_dashboard_insights_subtitle: Dashboard overview of your local music collection
settings_info_thanks_desc_1: Aurora Pulse thrives on your feedback, bug reports and ideas. Every reply — via the issue tracker, email or Reddit — feeds straight back into our roadmap.
settings_info_thanks_desc_2: Many improvements in recent releases (library performance, DAP sync, podcast integration, equalizer profiles, UI polish) are based on concrete community input. Thank you for shaping the player together with us.
settings_info_thanks_desc_3: If you enjoy Aurora Pulse we love hearing more feedback, GitHub stars and your stories about how you experience your music.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_title: Vibe – Music & Podcast Launcher — Android companion
settings_info_pulse_launcher_desc_1: Vibe – Music & Podcast Launcher is a standalone Android launcher tailored for music and podcast lovers as well as DAPs (Digital Audio Players). Instead of a generic app grid, your music, podcasts and quick playback controls take center stage — combined with a focused, distraction-free home screen.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_desc_2: A perfect companion to Aurora Pulse: sync your library to your Android device with DAP Sync and enjoy it on the go in a launcher built specifically for music.
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_hom: Music-first home screen with Now Playing, artwork, and volume / playback controls right from the lock screen
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_lib: Quick access to albums, artists, playlists and podcasts — with a cover wall and large, finger-friendly controls
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_dap: DAP Sync compatibility: plays the folder layout (Music/Podcasts) synced by Aurora Pulse natively — including from SD card
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_pod: Built-in podcast player with episode management, progress tracking and automatic resume
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_wid: Customizable widgets, Vibe themes and wallpapers for portrait and landscape — ideal for DAPs with horizontal displays
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_foc: Focus mode: no noisy app drawer, just a curated set of audio apps and shortcuts
settings_info_pulse_launcher_feature_off: 100% offline-capable, privacy-friendly and tracking-free — aligned with Aurora Pulse local-first philosophy
label_settings_dap_reset_state_descripti: Resets the stored sync state. On the next sync, all files are re-checked and copied if needed (e.g. after formatting the SD card).
label_settings_dap_reset_state_done: Sync state has been reset. All files will be transferred again on the next sync.
label_settings_dlna_upnp_description_suf: When enabled, it starts automatically and is published as a UPnP MediaServer (DMS) via SSDP discovery.
